properties.description: creating a pipeline to ingest cases and deaths data from http link to adls

activities.name: Copy ecdc data
activities.description: copying ecdc cases and deaths data from http address to data lake

activities.name: Check If File Exists
activities.description: we are using validation activity to make sure we have source file availabale.

activities.name: Get File Metadata
activities.description: we are using Get Metadata activity to get the column count in the dataset

ifFalseActivities.name: Data Validation Fail
ifFalseActivities.description: Since the columns in the input dataset didnot match we want to fail pipeline to not corrupt downstream data systems

ifTrueActivities.name: Delete Source File
ifTrueActivities.description: once the copy activity is successfully completed we are going to delete the source file

properties.description: This population will process the population data as per requirements

Dataflow to transform the Cases and Deaths Data

transformations.name: filtereuropeonly
transformations.description: filtering only europe data from the dataset

transformations.name: AddingDriftedColumns
transformations.description: Creates an explicit mapping for each drifted column

transformations.name: MapDrifted1
transformations.description: Creates an explicit mapping for each drifted column

scriptLines: SelectOnlyRequiredColumns split(indicator=='Weekly new hospital admissions per 100k' || indicator=='Weekly new ICU admissions per 100k',
PivotDaily derive({Daily ICU occupancy_count} = toDouble(byName('Daily ICU occupancy_count')),
{Daily hospital occupancy_count} = toDouble(byName('Daily hospital occupancy_count'))) ~> MapDrifted1
pivotBy(indicator, ['Weekly new hospital admissions per 100k', 'Weekly new ICU admissions per 100k']),

transformations.name: MapDrifted1
transformations.description: Creates an explicit mapping for each drifted column
